'''Risso''' was a [[planet]] located<ref name="Traveler's Guide">''[[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: Traveler's Guide to Batuu]]''</ref> in the [[Risso system]],<ref name="Appendix" /> situated in the [[Trailing Sectors]]<ref name="Location" /> portion of the [[Inner Rim Territories|Inner Rim]] region, in grid square N-14 on the [[Standard Galactic Grid]].<ref name="Appendix" /> It shared its name with the [[Risso hot springs moon]],<ref name="ACOF">''[[A Crash of Fate]]''</ref> located in the same system,<ref name="Appendix" /> which was known for its thermal [[water]]s.<ref name="ACOF" /> In [[34 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{TravelersGuidetoBatuuDate}}</ref> author and [[historian]] [[Eloc Throno]] included a [[map]] with the location of Risso in his [[book]] ''[[Traveler's Guide to Batuu]]'', a guide that detailed the planet [[Batuu]] and its [[Batuuan|inhabitants]].<ref name="Traveler's Guide" />

==Behind the scenes==
Risso was first mentioned in the [[2020]] reference book ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: Traveler's Guide to Batuu]]'', written by [[Cole Horton]].<ref name="Traveler's Guide" />
